q: (Where / your parents / go) for their honeymoon?
a: Where did your parents go for their honeymoon?

q: The lights (go) out last night, so we (light) some candles.
a: The lights went out last night, so we lit some candles.

q: Peter (stay) in Australia for two years.
a: Peter stayed in Australia for two years.

q: I (receive) his letter about a week ago.
a: I received his letter about a week ago.

q: We have repainted the door. (last month)
a: We repainted the door last month.

a: They put out the fire an hour ago.

q: The students (prepare) for the exam and (ask) many questions in class.
a: The students prepared for the exam and asked many questions in class.

q: Weimei come just now. She said she (bring) some magazines over tonight.
a: Weimei come just now. She said she brought some magazines over tonight.

q: I (meet) my old friend when I (walk) through the city center last Saturday.
a: I met my old friend when I walked /was walking through the city center last Saturday.

q: He has shown us the photographs. (last Sunday)
a: He showed us the photographs last Sunday.

q: The dog (bark) fiercely because there is a stranger at the gate.
a: The dog barked fiercely because there was a stranger at the gate.

q: They (enjoy) the trip, but they (not like) the hotel.
a: They enjoyed the trip, but they didn't like the hotel.

q: I (take) a bus to school every day for four years.
a: I took a bus to school every day for four years.

q: A snake has bitten him on the leg. (just now)
a: A snake bit him on the leg just now.

q: I have tuition every Saturday. (a year)
a: I had tuition every Saturday for a year.

q: (Did / she / see) the email about the school event yesterday?
a: Did she see the email about the school event yesterday?

q: The children (play) in the garden while their mother (cook) dinner.
a: The children played in the garden while their mother was cooking dinner.

q: Some rats have eaten up the bread. (last night)
a: Some rats ate up the bread last night.

q: We (not buy) any souvenirs because the prices (be) too high.
a: We didn't buy any souvenirs because the prices were too high.

q: He (come) home at a quarter past twelve last night. Then he (go) straight to bed. He (not wake) up unitil it (be) eleven o'clock this morning.
a: He came home at a quarter past twelve last night. Then he went straight to bed. He did not wake up unitil it was eleven o'clock this morning.

q: We (meet) your brother just now. He (speak) to us for a few minutes and then he (drive) off.
a: We met your brother just now. He spoke to us for a few minutes and then he drove off.

q: I (not bring) my umbrella because the weather (look) fine in the morning.
a: I did not bring my umbrella because the weather looked fine in the morning.

a: He did not sleep well last night because his neighbors made a lot of noise.

q: We have raised the flag. (a short time ago)
a: We raised the flag a short time ago.

q: The doctor has given him an injection. (yesterday)
a: The doctor gave him an injection yesterday.

a: She wrote a long letter to her cousin who moved to Australia.

q: My uncle (tell) us a funny story when we (visit) him last weekend.
a: My uncle told us a funny story when we visited him last weekend.

q: I (post) the letter early this morning.
a: I posted the letter early this morning.

q: We (visit) Ruilan last week but she (be not) at home.
a: We visited Ruilan last week but she was not at home.

a: The cobbler mended your shoes yesterday.

q: He has shot it down. (this afternoon)
a: He shot it down this afternoon.

a: I dusted the shelves just now.

q: They (plant) a tree in their garden last month but is (die) a week later.
a: They planted a tree in their garden last month but it died a week later.

q: Last Sunday my father (take) us to the beach. Half-way through the journey it (start) to rain. The road (become) very slippery. Suddenly our car (skid) at a sharp bend in the road and (crash) into a big drain. Luckily none of us (be) hurt.
a: Last Sunday my father took us to the beach. Half-way through the journey it started to rain. The road became very slippery. Suddenlyour car skidded at a sharp bend in the road and crashed into a big drain. Luckily none of us were hurt.

a: What did you eat for breakfast yesterday before going to school?

a: She typed all the letters this morning.

a: We caught a lot of fish yesterday, but we did not eat any of them.

q: I (visit) Australia in July last year. I (enjoy) my stay there. I even (take) a photograph of a kangaroo, but I (forget) to take it home with me when I (leave).
a: I visited Australia in July last year. I enjoyed my stay there. I even took a photograph of a kangaroo, but I forgot to take it home with me when I left.

q: We (not understand) the instructions, so the teacher (explain) them again.
a: We did not understand the instructions, so the teacher explained them again.

a: She didn't go to the party because she had a terrible headache.

a: They left ten minutes ago.

q: Do hurry up! Your friends (wait) for you outside.

a: He won a prize last week.
